title: Silent Horizons
description: Silent Horizon plunges you into a hyper-realistic world where the calm of day hides the deadly tension that awakens with the night.
body:
### Intro
Daylight lingers softly, painting the world with quiet warmth and subtle life. Beneath that gentle calm, every detail hums with meaning, inviting you to listen closely. But as the horizon swallows the sun, the light fades into a heavy stillness. Shadows stretch long and cold, the air tightens with unease, and the silence deepens—alone, tense, and watching. In this world, every night brings a slow unraveling, where fear moves just beneath the surface and danger waits in the dark. 

Crafted for deep immersion and stark realism, this modpack challenges you to survive in a place where the quiet is as perilous as the night itself.

### Features:
- Photorealistic shaders and resources
- Dynamic sound & music
- New mobs and advanced monster AI
- Block, mob, and particle physics
- Enhanced particle systems
- New health system
- Revamped flying and swimming
- Peer-to-peer multiplayer
- Voice chat

### Highly recommended map:
All the screenshots in the gallery were taken in the free [Tideworn survival map](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/tideworn-forgotten-flooded-city/).
![A zoomed out map of the Tideworn survival map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3ab74d7759f64bf411e2f2a446ded9f03c2e36e_0.webp)
_Thanks to [Milkshake___](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/milkshake___/) for the amazing map!_

## ⚠ WARNING:  This modpack is resource-intensive
The highest quality settings are enabled by default, so some configuration may be necessary before playing.
_**Make sure you have 6GB or more of memory allocated to the game for the best experience**_

Want more quality?
- Set shader settings to ultra
- Increase Distant Horizons mod quality and CPU load settings

Too slow or laggy?
- Lower shader quality, switch to another, or play without shaders.
- **Allocate more memory to the game**
- Preload chunks by running ```/chunky radius 600```, ```/chunky start```, and then reloading the world.
- Disable Patrix resource pack


## Disclaimer
This is just a modpack made for playing with friends and may not be maintained.

#### Report issues at [https://github.com/NodeNebula96/SilentHorizons/issues](https://github.com/NodeNebula96/SilentHorizons/issues)
